content.text:
I'm unable to complete the visual check. The file `/Users/admin/slide-v2-2.jpg` exists (85 KB, 1500x844 resolution JPEG), but the image could not be rendered in this environment -- the Read tool returned "Unsupported Image" on both attempts.

This likely means the current model does not support multimodal image input. To verify the contrast and layout, you could:

1. Open the file directly on your machine (it's at `/Users/admin/slide-v2-2.jpg`).
2. If you have a PPTX source or the earlier slide version, I could inspect the label colors programmatically from that source instead.
3. Alternatively, if you can describe what you see (or share a screenshot in a supported format), I can analyze from your description.
